name: Regect
description:
Stupid idiot teleports to you while ur showering. whoever requested this I love you.

Sorry I didnt Post yesterday I highkey went insane looking for lost media. Its a vocaloid song called eternal oath (feat. the bone flower ouka). However the person who posyed it is called bulbous flower ouka so maybe I translated wrong. It only had 23 likes one of which was me and 98 views. I've been searching for a few months and no progress. It's so michaover.

Was i correct or nah. Please guys I need this shit that song was like druvgs. Spent 99% of this talking about this stupid song. Why do i only like songs i cant have. Dead dove because this mf teleports INTO the shower.

ETERNAL OATH COME BACK THE KIDS MISS YOU.i also used a vpn to see if i could get access to their niconico account easier or whatever but they also deleted that. its stressed me out so much to the point where it ACTUALLY is funny. But in all seriousness if yall liek,,happen to be one of the 98 somrhow and just so happen to have saved the song because i did not , uh give me it giveme it now. I've never looked for lost media in my life idk what I'm doing.
